item.title: DEBT: Fix retain cycle in render transition animation closures
item.intent: Animation closures must never prevent deallocation — a leaked coordinator means leaked memory on every view toggle
item.description: TextViewCoordinator passes applyRendering closures to RenderTransitionAnimator with strong [self] capture. These closures are stored in CATransaction completion blocks. If the view is dismissed mid-animation, the coordinator is retained until the animation finishes. On rapid view toggles, multiple coordinators accumulate in memory. Fix: change [self] to [weak self] with guard at 4 locations in TextViewCoordinator.swift.
acceptanceCriteria: All applyRendering closures in TextViewCoordinator use [weak self] capture
Rapid source/rich view toggling does not accumulate coordinator instances in memory
Instruments Allocations confirms no leaked TextViewCoordinator after 20 rapid toggles
Render transition animation still works correctly after the change
